parameters.query:
-- SMOKE TEST first (LIMIT 3). Remove LIMIT for full run.
SELECT
  internal_number,
  content,
  table_blocks,
  metadata,
  qdrant_collection AS old_collection
FROM documents
WHERE qdrant_collection != 'NEG_v4' OR qdrant_collection IS NULL
ORDER BY processed_at ASC
LIMIT 3;

workflowId.cachedResultName: S-02 RAG Ingestion Service (Phase B v2)
